steps.title: Locate the key feature
steps.content: The passage directly states that “the bark of Hevea brasiliensis is helpful for the process of making rubber because it has a unique structure that makes it easy to collect latex.”

steps.title: Match the feature to the correct choice
steps.content: Choice B identifies the bark's unique structure as the helpful feature. The other three focus on unmentioned attributes: latex quality, climate range, and tree rarity in the Amazon. That matches choice B — B is correct.
